description:
You are a coastal engineer performing an Extreme Value Analysis on coastal flood data to determine design sea levels for a new seawall. Using the 'portpirie' dataset from the 'evd' package, fit a Generalized Extreme Value (GEV) distribution using Maximum Likelihood Estimation to estimate storm surge heights. Calculate return levels for 10, 50, and 100-year return periods and generate a 4-panel diagnostic plot of the fitted model.

Save the following deliverables to /home/ga/RProjects/output/:
- 'gev_params.csv': Model parameters with columns 'location', 'scale', and 'shape'.
- 'return_levels.csv': Return levels with columns 'period' (10, 50, 100) and 'level'.
- 'evd_diagnostics.png': The diagnostic plot image.
- 'flood_analysis.R': The complete analysis script.
